summary: Route consulting-contract timesheets correctly and localize timesheet errors.

notes: Migrates project business type CC to CONSULTING while keeping the existing cc_* role keys as consulting-contract role semantics.
Routes consulting-contract projects through the submitter department's project owner and department owner.
Keeps PMCC as the longest mixed-timesheet approval backbone and marks consulting-contract project blocks complete after the consulting two-step review.
Repairs submitted or running timesheets whose business document/template no longer matches the recalculated CONSULTING or PMCC routing.
Project business type labels now display as 咨询合同 instead of CC.
Timesheet save, submit, and withdraw errors now include Chinese user guidance plus technical details.
Timesheet error toasts include a 复制详情 action so users can copy the diagnostic message.

verification: Run npm --prefix frontend run build with VITE_APP_VERSION=V0.18.34.
Verify 刘学霈 2026-06-22 P016 resolves to 王岳峰 then 常雪松.
Run deploy/scripts/pre-deploy-check.sh on the cloud host with EXPECTED_VERSION=V0.18.34.
Run scripts/smoke-frontend-render.mjs against production with EXPECTED_VERSION=V0.18.34.
known_warnings: Vite may still warn that some chunks are larger than 500 kB.
